main.description: Exchange a member grant for a space credential. Called on the space owner's PDS. The grant is presented as the request's authorization token. Optionally pass `notifyEndpoint` to register the requesting service to receive write notifications for this space. The space credential can be used to read data from member PDSes.

notifyEndpoint.description: Optional endpoint where the requesting service should receive write notifications for this space. If omitted, the service will not receive notifyWrite events.
